name: Sonic Healthcare Limited
analysis: SHL has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 29% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Trade idea: entry A$19.9400, stop A$18.2655, target A$22.7486 (1.68:1) — then trail it.
